intro: Rows of weathered headstones line the graveyard. Each marks a trainer who fell on a long, hard road.
speaker: Graveside Keeper
introDialogue: These are the fallen, every one of them a real challenger who came before you.$You may pay your respects and take a memento, or disturb the grave and face what still lingers. Choose carefully.
title: Graves of the Fallen
description: One headstone stands out: {{trainerName}}, {{difficulty}} difficulty, fell at wave {{waveReached}}, beaten by {{opponentName}}. You can pay your respects for a memento, or disturb the grave and fight the team that rests here.

1.label: Pay respects
1.tooltip:
(+) Receive a memento from the fallen team's loadout
(+) Leave in peace, no battle
1.selected: You bow your head at the grave. A memento of the fallen team is left in your care.

2.label: Disturb the grave
2.tooltip:
(-) The fallen team's ghost rises and fights you
(+) Win to claim two of their held items
2.selected: The earth stirs. The fallen team rises to defend its rest!
